trading_instructions.scan_time: 23:00 UTC (6:00 PM ET) — after daily candle close
trading_instructions.execution_window: Execute within 1 hour of scan. Use LIMIT orders at scan price or better.

actions_today.instruction: BUY ALGO — Place LIMIT BUY at $0.1230. Position size: 12.0% of portfolio. Immediately set STOP LOSS at $0.1181 and TAKE PROFIT at $0.1378. If not filled in 1hr, use MARKET order. Max hold: exit by 2026-04-10 regardless.

BUY MATIC — Place LIMIT BUY at $0.2164. Position size: 10.5% of portfolio. Immediately set STOP LOSS at $0.2078 and TAKE PROFIT at $0.2424. If not filled in 1hr, use MARKET order. Max hold: exit by 2026-04-10 regardless.

open_position_management.instruction: HOLD ALGO — Entry $0.1230, Now $0.1230 (+0.00%). Day 0/5. SL: $0.1181, TP: $0.1378. Keep stop loss and take profit orders active.
HOLD MATIC — Entry $0.2164, Now $0.2164 (+0.00%). Day 0/5. SL: $0.2078, TP: $0.2424. Keep stop loss and take profit orders active.

rules_reference.entry_rule: BUY at current price when ALL conditions met: MTMDI z-score >= 1.0, direction positive, and 3+ of 5 confirming factors fire.
exit_rules: SELL if price drops 4% from entry (STOP LOSS at entry_price * 0.96)
SELL if price rises 12% from entry (TAKE PROFIT at entry_price * 1.12)
SELL after 5 calendar days regardless of P&L (MAX HOLD)
SELL if MTMDI z-score drops below 0.4 OR velocity reverses below -0.3 (SIGNAL RESOLVED)
rules_reference.position_sizing: Size = 40% / coin_30d_vol * signal_strength. Max 12% per coin, 90% total.
rules_reference.order_type: LIMIT order at current close price. If not filled within 1 hour, use MARKET order.
rules_reference.exchange: Any major CEX (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken). Use spot, NOT futures.
